articles.headline: World Cup final squads ranked: Of all 48 national teams, who can win this summer?

notes.text: St. Vincent and the Grenadines advances.

keyEvents.text: Goal! St. Vincent and the Grenadines 1, Anguilla 0. Oalex Anderson (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Micah Joseph.
Goal! St. Vincent and the Grenadines 2, Anguilla 0. Cornelius Stewart (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Jomarie Lynch (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Kirtney Franklyn replaces Najima Burgin.
Substitution, Anguilla. Antoine Fleming replaces Kion Lee.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Tristan Marshall replaces Jomarie Lynch.

Goal! St. Vincent and the Grenadines 3, Anguilla 0. Micah Joseph (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) header from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Kirtney Franklyn with a cross.
Substitution, Anguilla. Javis Jones replaces Keante Brooks.
Substitution, Anguilla. Malachi Gumbs replaces Alexander Fleming.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Kyle Edwards replaces Micah Joseph.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Garret Leigertwood replaces Steven Pierre.

Goal! St. Vincent and the Grenadines 4, Anguilla 0. Kyle Edwards (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) with an attempt from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Kirtney Franklyn with a cross.
Substitution, Anguilla. Nicholas Loblack replaces Luke Paris.
Substitution, Anguilla. Marley Ipinson-Fabien replaces Varian Carty.

Goal! St. Vincent and the Grenadines 5, Anguilla 0. Oalex Anderson (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) header from the left side of the six yard box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Tristan Marshall.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Kennijah Joseph replaces Diel Spring.

Goal! St. Vincent and the Grenadines 6, Anguilla 0. Kirtney Franklyn (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Kennijah Joseph with a through ball.
Second Half ends, St. Vincent and the Grenadines 6, Anguilla 0.
